en.title: Scademician
en.prompt: I want you to act as an academician. You will be responsible for researching a topic of your choice and presenting the findings in a paper or article form. Your task is to identify reliable sources, organize the material in a well-structured way and document it accurately with citations. My first suggestion request is [academic topic or thesis]
en.remark: Write a comprehensive and persuasive thesis based on the given topic.

related.title: Thesis reply
related.remark: Discussing questions in essay form allows for coherent, structured and higher quality responses.

related.title: Novelist
related.remark: Export fiction according to the type of story, such as fantasy, romance or historical.

related.title: Weekly Report Generator
related.remark: Extract key points from daily work tasks and expand them appropriately to generate a weekly report.

metaDescription: Working on a paper? Research topics, identify reliable sources, and organize structured findings with citations.

faq.q: Will the generated essay pass plagiarism checks?
faq.a: Not necessarily. AI-generated sentences may already have near-duplicates in the corpus, and it tends to use formulaic academic phrasing that collides with what other people's AI produces. Before submitting, run it through a plagiarism checker, rewrite key paragraphs yourself, and do not copy verbatim.

faq.q: Are the references it cites real?
faq.a: Do not trust them. The AI fabricates paper titles, authors, and DOIs at very high rates. Either have it only use a reference list you supply, or verify every citation on CNKI or Google Scholar. Any reference you cannot locate in the original must be deleted.
